resourceCard.description: More than 50,000 Quranic words with rich morphology and semantic data.

detail.requestReviewed: Your request will be reviewed soon
detail.previewUnavailable: Preview not available for this resource

footer.description: A community-driven hub for Quranic development assets.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} RATQ Community Platform. All rights reserved.

why.paragraph1: RATQ was created to bring Quranic software resources together in one clear and accessible place.
why.paragraph2: We help developers, researchers, and publishers discover useful work, understand how it can be used, and contribute resources that benefit the wider community.

whatIs.title: What is RATQ?
whatIs.paragraph1: RATQ is a community directory for Quranic libraries, SDKs, datasets, APIs, research tools, and other technical resources. It gives each resource a consistent place for its description, documentation, license, version, and access information.
whatIs.paragraph2Before: The platform also encourages careful publishing and review through the
whatIs.paragraph2After: , helping users evaluate accuracy, attribution, and technical quality before using a resource.

offer.title: What RATQ provides
offer.intro: The platform supports the full path from discovering a resource to publishing and maintaining one.

catalog.title: An organized resource catalog
catalog.description: Find Quranic libraries, datasets, APIs, SDKs, and research tools through a consistent and searchable directory.

verification.title: Clear quality information
verification.description: Review documentation, licenses, versions, attribution, and Itqan verification information before choosing a resource.

access.title: Access management for publishers
access.description: Publishers can manage restricted resources, review access requests, and keep resource information up to date.

community.title: Community feedback
community.description: Comments, reports, and reviews help identify useful resources, outdated information, and areas that need improvement.

tools.title: Tools for developers
tools.description: Developer-focused pages, API keys, documentation links, and integration details make resources easier to use in real projects.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: To make trusted Quranic technical resources easier to discover, understand, publish, and maintain, while supporting responsible collaboration between developers, researchers, and publishers.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: A connected Quranic technology community where valuable work is visible, well documented, properly attributed, and easier to build upon.

overview.title: Dashboard
overview.summary: Here is a quick view of your resources, access requests, and account status on RATQ.
overview.nextActionTitle: Publish or review your resources from one place.
overview.publishedResourcesDetail: Resources currently managed by your account.
overview.pendingRequestsDetail: Requests waiting for review or a decision.
overview.apiKeysDetail: Integration keys connected to your account.
overview.roleDetail: Current account permissions inside the platform.
overview.recentRequestsDetail: Track the latest requests for resources you manage.

resources.title: Manage published resources
resources.subtitle: Add new resources, review publishing status, and edit core metadata from one workspace.
resources.description: Resources created or managed by your RATQ account.
resources.empty: You have not published any resources yet.

requests.title: Review requests for your resources
requests.subtitle: Track new requests and make approval decisions from a clear, scannable page.

apiKeys.title: Manage integration keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Review access keys for services and integrations connected to your account.
apiKeys.securityText: Do not share keys in public repositories or frontend code.

settings.subtitle: Review account information and core dashboard preferences.

auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back. Continue to your account and manage your resources.
auth.loginPanelTitle: Access your tools and track your contributions clearly.
auth.loginBenefit1: Quick access to your dashboard and saved resources
auth.loginBenefit2: Track access requests and reports from one place
auth.loginBenefit3: Manage contributions for Quranic software development
auth.loginNote: A calm, organized platform for Quranic technical resources, designed for search, review, and repeated work.
auth.registerSubtitle: Join the RATQ community and start sharing and using resources.
auth.registerPanelTitle: Publish trusted Quranic resources and build with the community.
auth.registerBenefit1: Publish libraries, datasets, APIs, and developer tools
auth.registerBenefit2: Manage your resources and access requests from one dashboard
auth.registerBenefit3: Contribute to a focused catalog for Quranic technology
auth.registerNote: Choose the account role that best matches how you plan to contribute. You can still explore every public resource.
